title: Tama’s Kidnapping Exposes Wano’s Cruelty
description: On pages 9–12, this part focuses on Unknown person #9, Tsuru, Unknown person #10, Tama, Unknown person #11, Speed as Luffy and Zoro push into Kuri and Bakura Town as Tama’s kidnapping exposes the cruelty of the Beast Pirates.
scene: Luffy and Zoro move through Kuri and Bakura Town while Tama’s kidnapping pulls them into open conflict with the Beast Pirates.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: behind that Torli is a town where all of the government officials reside.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We are the people and things that they no longer need.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We survive by buying the noting ingredients they sell us.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...so that's why this place is called the Town of left- overs....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's fine. At the very least... we're able to survive here.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: WHO IS IT!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: kikikikikikikikikikikikikikikikikikikikikikikikikikikikikikikikikikikikikiki K!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You were talking bad about the Shogun, weren't you!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: I heard you, Woma AAAAAN!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Gifters RAJ MAN bat smile user

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: My hearing ability is six times that of a normal human's!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: The gifters...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hearing us from that far away is nice and all, but... was that really a reason to try to take someone's life?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: If that hit her, she would've died....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Tsuru
dialogue.text: O-TSURU!! Thank good- Ness you're okay!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If she had just kept to herself and kept quiet, I wouldn't have had to do a thing!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But... Master Orochi would absolutely not tolerate any of that rebellious talk!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You ALL HAD BEST BE CAREFUL. We're currently hunting down thieves.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A theft occurred at the farm a few weeks ago!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It wouldn't happen to have been you ronins, would it!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Who are you!? You blocked the arrows...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Wait a second, you one- eyed Ronin...!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I saw you on one of the sketch drawings!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Waaaaah!! Who are ya!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: TAMMA!!?

dialogue.speaker: Tama
dialogue.text: Waaa Aaah!! Big Bro, Save Meee EEE!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Grab!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hohoho!!!! I am iDATEN!! I can move at a speed of 200 kilometres an hour!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: I got kidnapped....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: GIFTERS GAZELLEMANY Gaelle smile user

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: WOOF!! WOOF!!

dialogue.speaker: Tama
dialogue.text: O-TAMA!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Such fast feet!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Let me ride you, Komainu!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: WOOF!!!

summary: This section advances the Wano Country - Kuri storyline with 35 dialogue beats. The rescue of Tama brings Luffy, Zoro, Kiku, and Law into direct contact with Wano’s local oppression.
